info.title: Obsidian Vault Saver
info.description: Saves a markdown note into the user's Obsidian vault GitHub repository (ChatGPT folder).

put.summary: Create a markdown note in the ChatGPT folder of the Obsidian vault.
put.description: Commits a single markdown file. The content field MUST be base64-encoded UTF-8.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Hyphenated .md filename, no spaces or slashes. Example: 2026-05-20-budget-planning.md

message.description: Git commit message, e.g. 'Add note: Budget planning'.

content.description: Base64-encoded UTF-8 markdown content of the note.

422.description: File already exists or validation error
